_comment: Propagation map: L0 (workspace root) → L1 (templates/common/) for scripts/skills/commands; L1 (templates/common/) → L2 (templates/co-*/) for governance docs via marker-inject mode. Agents are intentionally excluded from L0→L1 propagation — only pm.md uses an explicit extends chain (ADR-0039, ADR-0040). Specialist agents are variant-defined (ADR-0043). l2_drift_eligible (default true): controls whether this domain participates in L1→L2 drift detection via --check-drift. Set false for domains whose L2 content is managed through the Fork Model scaffolding pipeline (create-variant / promote-variant per ADR-0031) — L2 variants receive this content during scaffolding/promotion, not through ongoing L1→L2 sync.

scripts.note: Fork Model — 5 of 7 L2 variants have no scripts/; L2 scripts are injected during scaffolding

claude-skills.note: Fork Model — reconcile strips 16/19 L1 skills during promotion; L2 has 3-5 variant-specific skills only

gemini-settings.description: Antigravity CLI settings file — shared items only (mcpServers, hooks.SessionStart, hooks.PostToolUse). Claude-only items excluded per platform_settings.claude_only in common-contract.json.
gemini-settings.note: Only ongoing L1→L2 mirror — shared MCP server and hook config must stay identical across all tiers. All other domains use Fork Model (ADR-0031). Never include: CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS, teammateMode, TeammateIdle, TaskCreated, TaskCompleted, permissions — all claude_only per common-contract.json platform_settings

docs.note: Disabled until docs propagation policy is decided (ADR required). L1 docs/ is currently independently maintained, not a mirror of L0 docs/. Do not enable without resolving: full mirror vs. whitelist vs. stay independent. Inspect candidate output: --domain docs --include-disabled --dry-run.
docs.history: globFiles() never supported a wildcard within the filename component of a pattern — '**/*.md' reduced to the literal basename '*.md', which can never equal a real filename — so this domain silently matched zero files from the moment it was declared (confirmed 2026-07-08; templates/common/docs/ has 28 independently-authored files vs. 147 under root docs/). Fixed in propagate-to-templates.ts v2.1.0. Activating this domain as-is would copy ~143 previously-unmatched files on the next --apply, including L0-only content (e.g. docs/constitution/) that scripts/audit.ts's L0-leakage check forbids under templates/ — hence disabled rather than enabled by the fix.

governance-agents.description: L1 AGENTS.md COMMON-AGENTS section injection to all L2 variants (--docs mode only). Source is L1 (post-transformation) not L0.

skills.note: Fork Model — L2 maintains domain-specific skills independently (e.g. co-consult: 13, co-deck: 9)

claude-commands.note: Fork Model — L1 has 7 commands, only 3/7 L2 variants have 1 variant-specific command each

workspace-customizations.description: L0 .agents/ → L1 templates/common/.agents/ — flat JSON config files only
workspace-customizations.note: No L2 variant has .agents/*.json — workspace-root-only platform config

agents-skills.description: L0 .agents/skills/ → L1 templates/common/.agents/skills/ — Antigravity platform skills (shortcut wrappers)
agents-skills.note: No L2 variant has .agents/skills/ — workspace-root-only platform skills

claude-skills-json.description: L0 .claude/skills.json → L1 templates/common/.claude/skills.json — Claude skill path registration
claude-skills-json.note: No L2 variant has .claude/skills.json — workspace-root-only registration

gemini-skills-json.description: L0 .gemini/skills.json → L1 templates/common/.gemini/skills.json — Gemini skill path registration
gemini-skills-json.note: No L2 variant has .gemini/skills.json — workspace-root-only registration
